\tzpentry{ID5957}{Field Strength Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5957 introduces Field Strength Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \\mathcal{F}_{\ ext{eff}} = \\mathcal{F}_{\ ext{GL}} + g \\sum_{n,m} A_{n,m} |\\Psi|^2 J_m(k_{n,m} r). \\]
